name: local-keywords-files-finder
description: Local Keywords Files Finder — crawls, categorizes, and surfaces keyword-matched files locally

scripts.kill-ports: lsof -nP -iTCP:3001 -sTCP:LISTEN -t | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -nP -iTCP:3002 -sTCP:LISTEN -t | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.dev: npm run kill-ports && concurrently "npm run indexer" "npm run server" "npm run ui"
scripts.dev:fresh: npm run kill-ports && concurrently "npm run indexer:fresh" "npm run server" "npm run ui"
scripts.setup-hooks:
cp .git/hooks/pre-commit .git/hooks/pre-commit 2>/dev/null; node -e "const{writeFileSync,chmodSync}=require('fs');const h='.git/hooks/pre-commit';writeFileSync(h,'#!/bin/sh
node scripts/bump-version.mjs
git add version.json
');chmodSync(h,'755');console.log('pre-commit hook installed');"
